generated_testcases.title: TC-CONN-001: Verify earbud connection state accuracy after prolonged idle (30 min)
steps: Precondition: Left and right earbuds fully charged, connected via Bluetooth to phone.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Home → Connected Devices.
Verify both left and right earbuds show as 'Connected' in device list.
Set Surround level to 80 via: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround → Set slider to 80.
Press Home button to background the app. Do NOT kill the app.
Wait 30 minutes (idle period). Do not interact with phone or earbuds.
After 30 min, bring app to foreground (tap app icon).
Observe device list on Home screen.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround and read slider value.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Both left and right earbuds show 'Connected'. Surround slider reads 80. Actual (If Bug): Left shows 'Connected', Right shows 'Disconnected' OR device list is empty/incorrect. Surround slider may show default (0 or 50) instead of 80.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CONN-002: Immediate state sync — change Surround level and force-kill app before navigation
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, app open on Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround tab.
Set Surround slider to exactly 80.
DO NOT navigate away. Immediately force-kill the app (swipe from recent apps).
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround.
Observe slider value and device connection state on Home screen.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Surround slider persists at 80. Both earbuds show 'Connected'. Actual (If Bug): Surround resets to default (0 or 50). Device list may show stale or incorrect connection state (e.g., left connected, right disconnected).

generated_testcases.title: TC-CONN-003: Deep lifecycle — Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect after idle with Surround 80
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, app open.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround. Set slider to 80.
Background the app (Home button).
Wait 15 minutes.
From phone Bluetooth settings, disconnect the earbuds.
Wait 2 minutes.
Reconnect earbuds from phone Bluetooth settings.
Bring app to foreground.
Navigate to: Home → Connected Devices and observe connection state.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround and read slider value.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Both earbuds show 'Connected'. Surround slider reads 80. Actual (If Bug): Device list shows stale state (left connected, right disconnected) or empty. Surround may reset to default.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CONN-004: Phone reboot lifecycle — verify connection state and Surround persistence
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, app open.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround. Set slider to 80.
Close app gracefully (navigate away, then exit).
Reboot the phone.
After reboot, open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: Home → Connected Devices.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Both earbuds show 'Connected' after reconnection. Surround slider reads 80. Actual (If Bug): Device list shows incorrect state (left connected, right disconnected) or requires manual refresh. Surround resets to default.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CONN-005: Rapid app foreground/background cycling after setting Surround 80
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, app open on Surround tab.
Set Surround slider to 80.
Background app (Home button). Immediately (within 1 sec) bring app to foreground.
Repeat rapid background/foreground cycle 10 times.
After 10th cycle, observe device list on Home screen.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround and read slider.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Both earbuds show 'Connected' after all cycles. Surround slider remains at 80. Actual (If Bug): Device list shows stale/incorrect state after rapid cycling. Surround may drift from 80.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CONN-006: Verify device list refresh on app resume after long idle with media playing
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, music playing via media app on phone.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Home → Connected Devices. Verify both earbuds show 'Connected'.
Set Surround to 80 via: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround.
Background the app. Keep music playing through earbuds.
Wait 20 minutes with music playing.
Pause music. Bring app to foreground.
Observe device list on Home screen.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Both earbuds show 'Connected'. Surround slider reads 80. Actual (If Bug): Device list shows stale state (left connected, right disconnected) despite active audio stream. Surround may show incorrect value.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CONN-007: Asymmetric device state — left earbud disconnected mid-session, verify right still shows Surround 80
steps: Precondition: Both earbuds connected, app open.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround. Set slider to 80.
Place left earbud in charging case (disconnects left only).
Wait 10 seconds.
Observe device list on Home screen.
Remove left earbud from case (reconnects).
Wait 10 seconds.
Observe device list again.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency → Surround.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: When left disconnects, device list shows 'Left: Disconnected, Right: Connected'. When left reconnects, both show 'Connected'. Surround slider remains at 80 throughout. Actual (If Bug): After reconnection, device list incorrectly shows left as disconnected, or Surround resets.
